_comment: CloudFront Response Headers Policy for springvalleydentistry.com (June 2026 v5). Create via: aws cloudfront create-response-headers-policy --response-headers-policy-config file://cloudfront-response-headers-policy.json  — then attach the policy to the distribution's default cache behavior. CSP is REPORT-ONLY on purpose: watch the console/reports for violations for 2-4 weeks, then move the same value to contentSecurityPolicy with override true.

ResponseHeadersPolicyConfig.Name: svd-security-headers-v5
ResponseHeadersPolicyConfig.Comment: Security baseline for Spring Valley Dental static site

Items.Value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://plausible.io; connect-src 'self' https://api.web3forms.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://analytics.google.com https://plausible.io; img-src 'self' data: https://www.google.com https://maps.gstatic.com https://maps.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src https://www.google.com; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://api.web3forms.com
